Wholesale & Bulk Sale · MOQ from 50 pcs

Bigger orders. Bigger savings.

Stock up on polos, tees, caps and workwear at tiered wholesale pricing. The more you order, the more you save — with fast turnaround and nationwide delivery for retailers, distributors and resellers.

  • Tiered wholesale pricing — bigger quantity, bigger discount
  • Ready-stock catalogue for immediate dispatch
  • Custom labeling & packaging available for resellers

What we produce

Eight ways we supply your team

From a single branded hoodie run to a full seasonal uniform rollout, every order runs through the same factory ecosystem. Browse examples and specification sheets for each category below.

Uniforms & Workwear
Industrial uniforms, coveralls, aprons, lab coats & branded vests
T-Shirts
Graphic, plain, printed — every neckline, fabric and print method
Polo Shirts
Solid, tipped, panel and jacquard collar options
Jerseys & Sportswear
Club, school, university, corporate and esports jerseys
Caps & Headwear
Baseball, snapback, trucker, bucket and more
Safety Items
Head to foot protection, fire safety and industrial accessories
Corporate Gifts
Drinkware, tech accessories, desk items, awards and eco-friendly gifts
Bags
Backpacks, totes, travel, business and promotional bags
01
Corporate Uniforms

Branded workwear, front-desk and field uniforms, tailored fits and consistent sizing across departments.

02
Corporate Gifting

Branded apparel, drinkware, tech accessories and gift sets for onboarding kits and client appreciation.

03
Jerseys, Polos & Caps

Team jerseys, caps and polos for events, tournaments and campaigns — produced fast, priced for volume.

04
Bulk Manufacturing

Custom-made apparel, bags and safety solutions produced to your exact specification, at scale.

Trusted by

Brands we've worked with

We manufacture and deliver bulk corporate apparel, promotional wear, and branded merchandise for 100+ recognised companies across Bangladesh, giving each partner brand consistent quality, on-time delivery, and factory-direct pricing on every order.

Order process

From quotation to delivery, in five steps

  • 01
    Get quotation

    Share product type, quantity, branding and target timeline — we'll come back with a tailored quotation and MOQ.

  • 02
    Prepare master sample

    We produce a master sample against your spec before full production begins.

  • 03
    Approval

    You review and sign off on the sample — fabric, fit, branding and print — before we proceed.

  • 04
    60% advance on order confirm

    Production is scheduled once the order is confirmed with a 60% advance payment.

  • 05
    40% on delivery

    The remaining 40% is due on delivery, once your order is complete and quality-checked.

6 Years
Of craftmanship
24/7
Customer support
No hidden
Charges
Own factory
Better quality control
৳
Payment Method

60% advance on order confirmation, 40% on delivery. Payments accepted via bank transfer, mobile banking (bKash / Nagad), or cash at our office.

⏱
Delivery Terms

Production timelines are confirmed at quotation and depend on order quantity and customization. Delivery across Bangladesh with tracked, reliable logistics.

🚚
Door-to-Door Delivery

Finished goods delivered directly to your office, warehouse or distribution points nationwide — no pickup required.

Trusted by

Outlets we supply

Millennial Clothing's retail and franchise outlets across Dhaka and beyond rely on us for steady, in-stock supply of everyday wear, workwear, and seasonal collections — backed by dependable restocking and quality control at every step.

+ See more
Trusted by

Factories we've worked with

Every corporate order is produced inside our audited factory network in Dhaka and Narayanganj, covering T-shirts, polos, jerseys, uniforms, hoodies, jackets, printing, and embroidery — so quality and lead times stay consistent at any order volume.

Newsletter

Get new collection drops, corporate offers and factory updates straight to your inbox.

Millennial Corporate

Millennial Clothing is Bangladesh's own apparel brand, built on 6+ years of factory-grade production. Our Corporate division brings that same craftsmanship to uniforms, jerseys, caps, bags and branded gifting — tailored to your organization's spec sheet, budget and deadline.
